hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && cat "$ROOT/brain/ORIENTATION.md" 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '---' && echo '' && cat "$ROOT/threads/_index.md" 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '---' && echo '' && echo '# Relay — message from previous session' && echo '' && tail -n 30 "$ROOT/threads/relay.md" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Orientation not found'
